agent_output_excerpt:
{
  "executive_summary": "Architecture for a real-time ML delivery time estimation service with a clear separation between the serving path (latency-critical, called at checkout) and the training path (batch, weekly). The design optimizes for the 100ms P99 constraint by pre-computing features and serving predictions via an in-process model rather than a remote inference service. A blue-green model deployment strategy enables instant rollback. Scoped for a 4-person team — avoids Kubernetes/Kubefl
